title: Percentage Calculator
description: Calculate percentages instantly. What is X% of Y? X is what percent of Y? And more.

title: Age Calculator
description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, days, and hours from your date of birth.

title: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index and find out if you are underweight, normal, overweight, or obese.

title: Temperature Converter
description: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine instantly.

title: Tip Calculator
description: Calculate tip amount and split the bill between any number of people.

title: Days Between Dates
description: Count the exact number of days, weeks, and months between any two dates.

title: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs. Get reading time estimates.

title: Random Number Generator
description: Generate random numbers within any range. Single or multiple numbers, no repeats option.

title: Mortgage Calculator
description: Calculate your monthly mortgage payment, total interest paid, and full amortization schedule.

title: Discount Calculator
description: Calculate the sale price after a discount. Find out how much you save.

title: Compound Interest Calculator
description: Visualize how your money grows with compound interest over time.

title: Case Converter
description: Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case and more.

title: Coin Flip
description: Flip a virtual coin. Get heads or tails instantly. Flip multiple times and track statistics.

title: Password Generator
description: Generate strong, random passwords. Customize length, symbols, numbers, and more.

title: Countdown Timer
description: Count down to any future date or event. Share your countdown with a link.

title: Salary to Hourly Calculator
description: Convert annual salary to hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly rates.

title: QR Code Generator
description: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, WiFi, email, and more. Download as PNG.

title: Color Picker & Converter
description: Pick any color and get HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSB values instantly.

title: Character Count

title: Weight Converter
description: Convert between pounds, kilograms, ounces, grams, stones, and more.
